zh.title: 以太坊/美元技术分析：短期弱势整理趋势
zh.content:
以太坊目前价格2324.63美元，较24小时微跌0.17%，显示市场短期内呈现弱势整理。价格已接近20日均线SMA(20)2339.90美元下方，整体仍处于均线压力区域，暗示多头力量受限。短期价格波动幅度较小，高低点2331.38/2322.23显示市场震荡明显。  

MACD指标显示-10.207，仍在零轴下方，说明空方动能略占优势。缺乏RSI数据限制了超买超卖的判断，但从价格与均线关系可推测市场未出现明显超买状态。短线技术信号偏向谨慎，投资者应注意回调风险，同时关注MACD柱线变化以捕捉动能转折。  

支撑位可关注2320美元附近，该水平若被有效守住，短线可能维持整理；阻力位在2340-2345美元区间，如突破该区域，可能带动一波反弹。当前价格受阻于SMA(20)，显示空方压力存在，若不能突破阻力，多头回补动力有限。  

交易策略上，建议短线投资者维持观望或轻仓操作，等待明确方向信号。激进交易者可在价格回踩支撑附近尝试低位布局，同时严格设置止损，以防跌破关键支撑引发加速下行。稳健投资者应等待MACD呈现黄金交叉或价格收复均线，作为进一步进场依据。

en.title: Ethereum vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Ethereum is currently consolidating just below short-term resistance near $2332, with the latest price at $2324.63. The intraday range has been narrow, indicating a lack of strong directional momentum. While the 24-hour change is slightly negative at -0.17%, this minor dip suggests market indecision rather than a full bearish reversal. Traders should monitor price action closely around the $2320 support zone, as a break below could trigger a short-term decline toward $2300. Conversely, reclaiming $2335 could signal renewed bullish interest.  

Technical indicators provide mixed signals. The MACD shows a negative reading of -10.21, implying the momentum is skewed slightly toward the downside, though the absence of a signal line makes crossovers uncertain. The 20-period SMA at $2339.90 is above the current price, acting as a resistance barrier in the short term. The lack of a reliable RSI reading limits overbought/oversold assessment, but price trading below the SMA suggests cautious sentiment among traders. Consolidation near key moving averages often precedes a decisive breakout, so monitoring volume and momentum shifts will be essential.  

Support and resistance levels are well-defined. Immediate support is found around $2320, reinforced by intraday lows, with secondary support near $2300. Resistance is anchored at $2335–$2340, coinciding with the 20-period SMA, followed by stronger resistance at $2350. These levels form a tight trading range, favoring range-bound strategies for short-term traders. Breakouts above or below these thresholds may signal directional continuation or reversal, requiring careful position sizing and stop-loss placement to manage risk effectively.  

For trading suggestions, a cautious approach is advised. Short-term traders may consider buying near $2320 with tight stops if bullish reversal patterns emerge, targeting $2335–$2340. Conversely, selling on failed rallies toward the SMA could capture minor retracements. Given the low volatility and mixed momentum, longer-term holders may prefer to wait for a confirmed breakout above $2340 for clearer trend direction. Maintaining disciplined risk management will be critical amid current consolidation conditions.
